title: 炼狱津-噩梦、地狱、炼狱攻略
summary: 重点：别上同属性的角色。Boss伤害很高。要么磨，要么速通。噩梦：对于噩梦难度来说，没有难度，不需要考虑机制，用常见的破甲或者辅助+主C+梨梨+随便一个奶妈就能过。或者说有点难度的队伍都可以无视机制过关。切记主C在梨梨或者别的辅助后面出手，破甲手在主C出手前破甲就行了。地狱：从地狱开始就需要考虑副本
content_json: [{"type":"video","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/video/50364/889292/2025/7/27/189670.mp4","poster":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/video/50364/889292/2025/7/27/762269.png","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":"","text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":"","text":"重点：别上同属性的角色。Boss伤害很高。要么磨，要么速通。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":" ","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"噩梦：","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"对于噩梦难度来说，没有难度，不需要考虑机制，用常见的破甲或者辅助+主C+梨梨+随便一个奶妈就能过。或者说有点难度的队伍都可以无视机制过关。切记主C在梨梨或者别的辅助后面出手，破甲手在主C出手前破甲就行了。","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":null,"src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_437/h_114/50364/2025/8/27/efc8ac51-cff9-481f-83fd-85e10d677ae6png","alt":null,"style":{"width":"437px","height":"114px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":" ","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":" ","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"地狱：","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"从地狱开始就需要考虑副本的机制了。","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"BOSS的核心技能：","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":null,"src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_580/h_264/50364/2025/8/27/9328609c-9054-4bcc-acdb-79f0dd8ac9f3png","alt":null,"style":{"width":"399px","height":"182px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":" ","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"同属性的我方角色累计行动就会被点名，造成伤害并且附上不可驱散的debuff。","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":null,"src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_310/h_334/50364/2025/8/27/0dc9b290-6c89-4c93-9ca4-9b3529d6863apng","alt":null,"style":{"width":"269px","height":"290px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":" ","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"假如在有debuff的情况下被“欲火烈旋”击中，而且自身刚好是被克制的相性，则有很大概率暴毙。","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":" ","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"所以我们需要了解各种目前能使用的角色：","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"table","key":"kaz1aR9kYlkl0KCI","width":"568px","children":[{"type":"table-row","children":[{"type":"table-cell","bgColor":"","width":"142px","children":[{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":" ","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]}]},{"type":"table-cell","bgColor":"","width":"142px","children":[{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"C","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]}]},{"type":"table-cell","bgColor":"","width":"142px","children":[{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"奶","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]}]},{"type":"table-cell","bgColor":"","width":"142px","children":[{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"辅助","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]}]}]},{"type":"table-row","children":[{"type":"table-cell","bgColor":"","width":"142px","children":[{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"恒定","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]}]},{"type":"table-cell","bgColor":"","width":"142px","children":[{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"夜离","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]}]},{"type":"table-cell","bgColor":"","width":"142px","children":[{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"恶命","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]}]},{"type":"table-cell","bgColor":"","width":"142px","children":[{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":" ","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]}]}]},{"type":"table-row","children":[{"type":"table-cell","bgColor":"","width":"142px","children":[{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"破序","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]}]},{"type":"table-cell","bgColor":"","width":"142px","children":[{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"莉拉姆、谛听","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]}]},{"type":"table-cell","bgColor":"","width":"142px","children":[{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":" ","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]}]},{"type":"table-cell","bgColor":"","width":"142px","children":[{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"梨梨","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]}]}]},{"type":"table-row","children":[{"type":"table-cell","bgColor":"","width":"142px","children":[{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"理","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]}]},{"type":"table-cell","bgColor":"","width":"142px","children":[{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":" ","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]}]},{"type":"table-cell","bgColor":"","width":"142px","children":[{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":" ","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]}]},{"type":"table-cell","bgColor":"","width":"142px","children":[{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":" ","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]}]}]},{"type":"table-row","children":[{"type":"table-cell","bgColor":"","width":"142px","children":[{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"虚","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]}]},{"type":"table-cell","bgColor":"","width":"142px","children":[{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":" ","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]}]},{"type":"table-cell","bgColor":"","width":"142px","children":[{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"善雅","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]}]},{"type":"table-cell","bgColor":"","width":"142px","children":[{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"克洛斯","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]}]}]},{"type":"table-row","children":[{"type":"table-cell","bgColor":"","width":"142px","children":[{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"异","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]}]},{"type":"table-cell","bgColor":"","width":"142px","children":[{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":" ","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]}]},{"type":"table-cell","bgColor":"","width":"142px","children":[{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"凌罗","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]}]},{"type":"table-cell","bgColor":"","width":"142px","children":[{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"蝰蛇","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]}]}]}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":" ","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"因为正常不能属性相同，所以可以选择的角色配队其实很少。速刷队因为是可以秒boss所以是论外，最后单独讨论。","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":" ","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"正常配队即为：","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"A队：夜离、梨梨、善雅、蝰蛇","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"B队：夜离、梨梨、克洛斯、凌罗","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"C队：莉拉姆（谛听）、恶命、善雅、蝰蛇","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"D队：莉拉姆（谛听）、恶命、克洛斯、凌罗","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":" ","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"到这一步只要配队逻辑正常，一般就能挂机过了。","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":" ","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"炼狱：","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"到了炼狱，你需要注意这一步主要考验的是我方角色的整体练度。需要三条智壳的就去刷能刷的三条智壳。","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"智壳选择：","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"table","key":"8S6XjU9rPH891f4Z","width":"567px","children":[{"type":"table-row","children":[{"type":"table-cell","bgColor":"","width":"121px","children":[{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"主C","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]}]},{"type":"table-cell","bgColor":"","width":"446px","children":[{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"启示录（多次伤害主C首选：夜离）、白獠武者（单体单发：谛听、莉拉姆）、伯爵（提升攻击+吸血）","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]}]}]},{"type":"table-row","children":[{"type":"table-cell","bgColor":"","width":"121px","children":[{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"辅助","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]}]},{"type":"table-cell","bgColor":"","width":"446px","children":[{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"琥珀（免死一次）、墨月（延长DEBUFF）、万圣节（刷新技能）。天角兽（驱散沉默）、灯塔（受击治疗拉条）、胡狼卫士（拉条+速度BUFF）、匠（防御力转化为巨额护盾）","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]}]}]},{"type":"table-row","children":[{"type":"table-cell","bgColor":"","width":"121px","children":[{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"奶妈","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]}]},{"type":"table-cell","bgColor":"","width":"446px","children":[{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"超新星（爆发治疗）、最强音（治疗储存）","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]}]}]}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":" ","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"套装12件套+8件套+6件套，所有角色能穿就尽量穿最好的，智壳的被动效果也要尽量洗到最好。炼狱炼狱津是对整体PVE的最终考试，马虎不得。","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":" ","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"这里提下速刷队：","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":null,"src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_424/h_603/50364/2025/8/27/e9e8e5e2-c72f-48aa-b606-db03146b8e92png","alt":null,"style":{"width":"276px","height":"392px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":null,"src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_413/h_607/50364/2025/8/27/a39a6f33-e5ea-4a9e-a24c-6a548c2f9559png","alt":null,"style":{"width":"267px","height":"393px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":null,"src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_418/h_609/50364/2025/8/27/044ced70-a000-4941-b95d-7cc4ddaf2fcbpng","alt":null,"style":{"width":"275px","height":"401px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":null,"src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_417/h_606/50364/2025/8/27/670e25be-c7ae-4e73-8eb7-58432038f5fapng","alt":null,"style":{"width":"274px","height":"399px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":" ","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":" ","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"最后附上实例：","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt
